name: TestGetWaitFrSymbolData
title: TestGetWaitFrSymbolData
description: If a FlexRay symbol event is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the event’s content can be called up with the first function.
The second function can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin...") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aSymbol
parameters.description: Event structure that should be filled in with this function (for selectors see event procedure on FRSymbol).

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Number of the "joined event" corresponds with the return value of "testJoin...".

return: Event structure that should be filled in with this

description: For an example see function TestWaitForFrSymbol.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
